title: Eric Weinstein Reveals UFO Physics! (Exclusive Interview)
summary: Jesse Michels interviews Eric Weinstein, covering topics ranging from Eric's theory of everything in physics (Geometric Unity/GU), institutional decay in America, generational wealth inequality, the relationship between the US and China, and surprisingly, UFOs - a topic Eric admits he was previously dismissive of but has changed his mind about after Pentagon reports.

acronyms.definition: Eric Weinstein's proposed theory of everything in physics that attempts to recover Einstein's relativity within a broader framework with additional parameters
US government agency that funds medical research including gain of function research
US intelligence agency involved in surveillance programs
US intelligence agency mentioned in context of Lookout Mountain facility in Laurel Canyon

events.description: Fauci restarts gain of function funding at NIH during Trump administration chaos
Joe Biden begins as a 29-year-old senator

key_claims.claim: A nine-page report from the Pentagon indicates either an incredible psychological operation or that some Pentagon officials believe with near certainty that Earth has been contacted and observed by extraterrestrials
Millennials own 4.8% of the wealth in the country
Close to 40% of millennial wealth is held by one person (implied to be Mark Zuckerberg)
The government farms out tyranny to private corporations because the government is under requirements not to engage in censorship directly
The US as a coherent country no longer exists in the way it did during World War II

Geometric Unity (GU) could potentially provide parameters to evade faster-than-light problems because FTL is about spacetime which is an Einsteinian concept, and GU may recover relativity within something broader
Lookout Mountain is a CIA facility in Laurel Canyon
Jim Morrison's father, Rear Admiral Steven Morrison, was in the Navy and in charge of the Gulf of Tonkin
